name: quickfix
title: Quick Fix
desc: Automatically repairs common document issues that can be fixed safely without manual review. This preset focuses on simple metadata, structure, font, and accessibility corrections.

actions.name: add_missing_unicode
actions.title: Add Missing Unicode Mappings
actions.desc: Add missing Unicode mappings to text where they can be derived automatically from the font or character information.

actions.name: set_display_doc_title
actions.title: Enable Display Document Title
actions.desc: Set the ViewerPreferences entry so PDF viewers display the document title instead of the file name in the window title.

actions.name: set_suspect_value
actions.title: Clear Suspects Flag
actions.desc: Fix the MarkInfo dictionary and Suspects entry to remove the flag indicating the document structure is unreliable.

actions.name: fix_oc_name
actions.title: Fix Optional Content Configuration
actions.desc: Repair the optional content configuration dictionary to ensure required entries are valid and properly defined.

actions.name: fix_media_clip_keys
actions.title: Fix Media Clip Metadata
actions.desc: Add or repair required media clip keys, such as MIME type information, for media clip annotations.

actions.name: set_tabs_key
actions.title: Set Page Tab Order
actions.desc: Set the Tabs key on pages to ensure a defined tab order for interactive content and form navigation.

actions.name: set_tag_id
actions.title: Generate Missing Tag IDs
actions.desc: Generate unique structure element IDs for tags that require them, such as Note or TH elements.

actions.name: fix_placement
actions.title: Fix Tag Placement Attributes
actions.desc: Correct invalid or inappropriate placement attributes for tags such as Figure, Formula, Form, and Note.

actions.name: fix_parent_tree
actions.title: Rebuild Parent Tree
actions.desc: Repair the structural parent tree to restore correct associations between page content and structure elements.

actions.name: fix_id_tree
actions.title: Repair ID Tree
actions.desc: Repair the document ID tree to restore valid references for structure elements and tagged content.
